title: HG Microwave Cleaner - Powerful & Safe Grease & Food Deposit Remover for All Microwave & Combi Ovens - Cleans Quickly & Easily - 500ml
features: HG Microwave Cleaner Spray: Easily removes grease and caked-on food in microwaves & combination microwaves. Cleans powerfully & quickly
Simple & strong degreaser for microwaves: Combination microwave safe. Suitable for the easy removal of grease & encrusted food remnants
Easy to use: Leaves your appliance looking & smelling hygienically clean & fresh. Food safe & suitable for regular cleaning the inside or outside of the oven
Safe for use on all surfaces & materials used in combi microwaves: Including glass plates & doors, metal surrounds & plastic handles
500ml spray: Spray the surface to be cleaned. Leave it to work for a few seconds before wiping the surface with kitchen roll. After that, wipe the microwave with a clean, damp dishcloth
description: Product Description HG Microwave Cleaner (500ml) is the powerful microwave cleaner which is safe to use on all microwaves and combination microwaves. The easy to use and fast acting spray effectively removes grease and caked-on food inside and outside of your appliance, leaving all the microwave’s surfaces hygienically clean and shiny again. This handy and powerful everyday microwave cleaner is safe to use on all the materials that are used in combination microwaves, from the glass plates and doors to the metal interior, or even a plastic or metal handle. This handy and ultra powerful microwave cleaner is suitable for everyday cleaning, or to tackle stubborn encrusted dried food from cooking and baking. Cleaning the microwave used to be a tricky and unpleasant task, but not any more with HG’s specialist Microwave Cleaner – it’s quick, easy and requires minimal scrubbing! Discover HG’s wide range of specialist cleaning products for your kitchen, home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Microwave Cleaner (500ml bottle with trigger action spray) How to use HG’s Microwave Cleaner: 1. Spray the surface to be cleaned directly with HG Microwave Cleaner. 2. Leave it to work for a few seconds. 3. Now wipe the surface with kitchen roll. 4. After that, wipe the microwave with a clean, damp dishcloth. In case of persistent dirt, use the HG Kitchen Sponge to make it easier to loosen the dirt. Note: do NOT spray the electrical parts. To clean these parts, we advise first spraying HG Microwave Cleaner onto a cloth and wiping indirectly. Legal Disclaimer 5 Box Contains 1 x HG Combi Microwave Cleaner See more
